hooks.command: p=$(jq -r '.prompt // empty'); if printf '%s' "$p" | grep -qiE '(^|[[:space:]])/daily([[:space:]]|$)'; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"/daily was invoked. BEFORE building the new briefing, FIRST check Gmail for a reply to the most recent Jackson Daily briefing from John (johnnywj@gmail.com) or Michelle (mgauthreaux91@gmail.com): search in:inbox newer_than:10d from:(johnnywj@gmail.com OR mgauthreaux91@gmail.com) Jackson Daily. If either replied with corrections or new durable facts, apply them to the relevant family/ markdown files and/or templates/daily-briefing.md and commit, THEN compose the briefing."}}'; fi; true
